title: tabernaemontana decaisnei
intro: Tabernaemontana decaisnei, also known as the Decaisne's tabernaemontana or the tabernaemontana tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimalarial compounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating malaria, as well as other infections and diseases. Tabernaemontana decaisnei is traditionally prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used in folk medicine to treat various ailments and promote overall health.
